news.t: Gene Munster's Innovator Deepwater Frontier Tech ETF (LOUP) Updates Strategy to Active Management, Capitalizing on Nimble Stock Selection
Market Extra: Quantum computing is so last-decade. Get ready to invest in the final frontier… teleportation

holdings.infoBox: LOUP is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are Credo Technology Group Holding stock at 5.18%, BE Semiconductor Industries at 4.99%, Roblox at 4.79%, AppLovin at 4.10%, and MiniMax Group at 3.71%.

overview.description: The Innovator Deepwater Frontier Tech ETF (LOUP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Loup Frontier Tech index. The fund is an actively managed fund that aims to investing in developed- and emerging-market stocks that are identified as being on the frontier of the development of technology. Holdings are selected and weighted based on fundamental criteria LOUP was launched on Jul 25, 2018 and is issued by Innovator.

data.title: Market Extra: Quantum computing is so last-decade. Get ready to invest in the final frontier… teleportation
data.text: Scientists just took one small step for teleporting humans but one giant leap for quantum computing, and it may be time to start looking at how to invest in this big shift.
